storybook.notes: CONFIGURED BUT BLOCKED: Storybook packages are installed and @storybook/addon-mcp is enabled in .storybook/main.ts, but runtime smoke failed in this checkout. npm run storybook currently prompts about port 6006/undefined, and CI mode errors with 'expected options to have a port'. Do not claim Storybook MCP until Storybook starts and http://localhost:6006/mcp responds.

shadcn.notes: Local shadcn package is installed and components.json resolves. Search and reuse approved shadcn/ui components. Always check src/ui/ (the DCX design system) before sourcing from shadcn.

playwright.notes: Local @playwright/mcp package and Chromium browser binary are installed. Use for browser navigation, screenshots, accessibility snapshots, and interaction verification.

semgrep.notes: INSTALLED BUT BLOCKED: Semgrep CLI is installed in the user Python environment and npm run scan:semgrep uses scripts/agent/run-semgrep.sh, but semgrep-core currently exits unexpectedly even on one-file scans. Keep MCP disabled until the CLI gate passes.

sonarqube.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Requires running SonarQube server and SONAR_TOKEN + SONAR_HOST_URL environment variables. Do not enable without confirmed external service. Use for repository-wide duplication and quality-gate findings.
